challengeRules: Defeat a real opponent while using one full set of Rock-shell, Spined, or Skeletal armor.
Wear at least two pieces from each of the other two armor sets.
Use an obsidian melee weapon, obsidian staff, and obsidian thrown weapon.
Damage the opponent with melee, ranged, and magic using only obsidian weapons.
The opponent must either be a legitimate PKer or have a loot key worth at least 500k.
All challenge requirements must be observed by participating players when completed in a multi-combat area.
challenges.disclaimer: *Reward items are not removed from the roulette after being unlocked, so duplicate hits are possible and you will probably need more than 12 challenge completions.

challengeRules: Defeat a real opponent while using Dragon mace(bh) as your only spec weapon.
The opponent must either be a legitimate pker or have a key worth at least 500k
The killing blow on your opponent must be a max hit and have the special max hitsplat.
Defeating 3 opponents in this manner completes the challenge.
